name: events_create
description: Trigger an event on one or more channels. Connected WebSocket clients subscribed to those channels receive the event data in real time. Limited to 10 channels per request and 10KB payload.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Event name (max 200 chars). Convention: use prefixed names like 'client-' for client events.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Event data as a JSON string. Max 10KB.

parameters.name: channels
parameters.description: Array of channel names to trigger on (max 10). Use this OR channel, not both.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Single channel name to trigger on.

parameters.name: socket_id
parameters.description: Socket ID to exclude from receiving this event (prevents echo to sender).

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to return: 'user_count', 'subscription_count'.
